name: softplus
cpp_unit: double softplus(double x){ return log(1.0 + exp(x)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", softplus(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", softplus(1.0)); printf("%.10g
", softplus(-2.0)); return 0; }

name: relu
cpp_unit: double relu(double x){ return x>0.0?x:0.0; }
mojo_unit:
def relu(x: Float64) -> Float64:
    return x if x > 0.0 else 0.0
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", relu(3.0)); printf("%.10g
", relu(-2.5)); printf("%.10g
", relu(0.0)); return 0; }

name: leaky_relu
cpp_unit: double leaky_relu(double x){ return x>0.0?x:0.01*x; }
mojo_unit:
def leaky_relu(x: Float64) -> Float64:
    return x if x > 0.0 else 0.01 * x
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", leaky_relu(4.0)); printf("%.10g
", leaky_relu(-3.0)); printf("%.10g
", leaky_relu(-100.0)); return 0; }

name: gelu_sigmoid_approx
cpp_unit: double gelu_sigmoid_approx(double x){ return x / (1.0 + exp(-1.702*x)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", gelu_sigmoid_approx(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", gelu_sigmoid_approx(1.0)); printf("%.10g
", gelu_sigmoid_approx(-1.5)); return 0; }

name: gaussian_pdf
cpp_unit: double gaussian_pdf(double x,double mu,double sigma){ double d=(x-mu)/sigma; double pi=3.14159265358979323846; return exp(-0.5*d*d)/(sigma*sqrt(2.0*pi)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", gaussian_pdf(0.0,0.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", gaussian_pdf(1.0,0.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", gaussian_pdf(2.0,1.0,2.0)); return 0; }

name: logistic_cdf
cpp_unit: double logistic_cdf(double x,double mu,double s){ return 1.0/(1.0 + exp(-(x-mu)/s)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", logistic_cdf(0.0,0.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", logistic_cdf(2.0,1.0,0.5)); printf("%.10g
", logistic_cdf(-1.0,0.0,2.0)); return 0; }

name: weighted_mean3
cpp_unit: double weighted_mean3(double a,double wa,double b,double wb,double c,double wc){ return (a*wa+b*wb+c*wc)/(wa+wb+wc); }
mojo_unit:
def weighted_mean3(a: Float64, wa: Float64, b: Float64, wb: Float64, c: Float64, wc: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (a * wa + b * wb + c * wc) / (wa + wb + wc)

name: coeff_variation
cpp_unit: double coeff_variation(double a,double b,double c,double d){ double m=(a+b+c+d)/4.0; double s=(a-m)*(a-m)+(b-m)*(b-m)+(c-m)*(c-m)+(d-m)*(d-m); double sd=sqrt(s/4.0); return sd/m; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", coeff_variation(2.0,4.0,4.0,6.0)); printf("%.10g\n", coeff_variation(10.0,20.0,30.0,40.0)); return 0; }

name: z_score
cpp_unit: double z_score(double x,double mu,double sigma){ return (x-mu)/sigma; }
mojo_unit:
def z_score(x: Float64, mu: Float64, sigma: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (x - mu) / sigma

name: min_max_normalize
cpp_unit: double min_max_normalize(double x,double lo,double hi){ return (x-lo)/(hi-lo); }
mojo_unit:
def min_max_normalize(x: Float64, lo: Float64, hi: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (x - lo) / (hi - lo)
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", min_max_normalize(5.0,0.0,10.0)); printf("%.10g
", min_max_normalize(75.0,50.0,100.0)); printf("%.10g
", min_max_normalize(-2.0,-5.0,5.0)); return 0; }

name: log_sum_exp2
cpp_unit: double log_sum_exp2(double a,double b){ double m=a>b?a:b; return m + log(exp(a-m)+exp(b-m)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", log_sum_exp2(1.0,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", log_sum_exp2(0.0,0.0)); printf("%.10g
", log_sum_exp2(-3.0,5.0)); return 0; }

name: cosine_similarity2d
cpp_unit: double cosine_similarity2d(double ax,double ay,double bx,double by){ double dot=ax*bx+ay*by; double na=sqrt(ax*ax+ay*ay); double nb=sqrt(bx*bx+by*by); return dot/(na*nb); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", cosine_similarity2d(1.0,0.0,0.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", cosine_similarity2d(1.0,1.0,2.0,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", cosine_similarity2d(3.0,4.0,4.0,3.0)); return 0; }

name: manhattan3d
cpp_unit: double manhattan3d(double x1,double y1,double z1,double x2,double y2,double z2){ return fabs(x2-x1)+fabs(y2-y1)+fabs(z2-z1); }
mojo_unit:
def manhattan3d(x1: Float64, y1: Float64, z1: Float64, x2: Float64, y2: Float64, z2: Float64) -> Float64:
    return abs(x2 - x1) + abs(y2 - y1) + abs(z2 - z1)
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", manhattan3d(0,0,0,1,2,3)); printf("%.10g\n", manhattan3d(1,1,1,-1,-1,-1)); return 0; }

name: chebyshev3d
cpp_unit: double chebyshev3d(double x1,double y1,double z1,double x2,double y2,double z2){ double dx=fabs(x2-x1),dy=fabs(y2-y1),dz=fabs(z2-z1); double m=dx; if(dy>m)m=dy; if(dz>m)m=dz; return m; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", chebyshev3d(0,0,0,1,5,3)); printf("%.10g\n", chebyshev3d(2,2,2,4,1,8)); return 0; }

name: angle_between2d
cpp_unit: double angle_between2d(double ax,double ay,double bx,double by){ double dot=ax*bx+ay*by; double cross=ax*by-ay*bx; return atan2(cross,dot); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", angle_between2d(1.0,0.0,0.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", angle_between2d(1.0,0.0,1.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", angle_between2d(1.0,1.0,-1.0,1.0)); return 0; }

name: slope
cpp_unit: double slope(double x1,double y1,double x2,double y2){ return (y2-y1)/(x2-x1); }
mojo_unit:
def slope(x1: Float64, y1: Float64, x2: Float64, y2: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1)

name: midpoint
cpp_unit: double midpoint(double a,double b){ return 0.5*(a+b); }
mojo_unit:
def midpoint(a: Float64, b: Float64) -> Float64:
    return 0.5 * (a + b)
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", midpoint(0.0,10.0)); printf("%.10g
", midpoint(-4.0,4.0)); printf("%.10g
", midpoint(3.5,8.5)); return 0; }

name: wrap_to_range
cpp_unit: double wrap_to_range(double x,double lo,double hi){ double range=hi-lo; double r=x-lo - trunc((x-lo)/range)*range; if(r<0.0) r+=range; return lo+r; }
mojo_unit:
from std.math import trunc

def wrap_to_range(x: Float64, lo: Float64, hi: Float64) -> Float64:
    var range = hi - lo
    var r = x - lo - trunc((x - lo) / range) * range
    if r < 0.0:
        r += range
    return lo + r
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", wrap_to_range(7.0,0.0,5.0)); printf("%.10g
", wrap_to_range(-1.0,0.0,360.0)); printf("%.10g
", wrap_to_range(12.5,1.0,10.0)); return 0; }

name: ema_step
cpp_unit: double ema_step(double prev,double x,double alpha){ return alpha*x + (1.0-alpha)*prev; }
mojo_unit:
def ema_step(prev: Float64, x: Float64, alpha: Float64) -> Float64:
    return alpha * x + (1.0 - alpha) * prev
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", ema_step(10.0,20.0,0.3)); printf("%.10g
", ema_step(5.0,5.0,0.5)); printf("%.10g
", ema_step(100.0,90.0,0.1)); return 0; }

name: compound_interest
cpp_unit: double compound_interest(double p,double r,double n,double t){ return p * pow(1.0 + r/n, n*t); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", compound_interest(1000.0,0.05,12.0,10.0)); printf("%.10g\n", compound_interest(500.0,0.08,4.0,5.0)); return 0; }

name: present_value
cpp_unit: double present_value(double fv,double r,double n){ return fv / pow(1.0+r, n); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", present_value(1000.0,0.05,10.0)); printf("%.10g\n", present_value(5000.0,0.07,5.0)); return 0; }

name: kinetic_energy
cpp_unit: double kinetic_energy(double m,double v){ return 0.5*m*v*v; }
mojo_unit:
def kinetic_energy(m: Float64, v: Float64) -> Float64:
    return 0.5 * m * v * v
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", kinetic_energy(2.0,3.0)); printf("%.10g
", kinetic_energy(10.0,5.0)); printf("%.10g
", kinetic_energy(1.5,2.0)); return 0; }

name: ideal_gas_pressure
cpp_unit: double ideal_gas_pressure(double n,double t,double v){ double R=8.314462618; return n*R*t/v; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", ideal_gas_pressure(1.0,300.0,0.0224)); printf("%.10g\n", ideal_gas_pressure(2.0,273.15,0.05)); return 0; }

name: reynolds_number
cpp_unit: double reynolds_number(double rho,double v,double l,double mu){ return rho*v*l/mu; }
mojo_unit:
def reynolds_number(rho: Float64, v: Float64, l: Float64, mu: Float64) -> Float64:
    return rho * v * l / mu
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", reynolds_number(1000.0,2.0,0.1,0.001)); printf("%.10g\n", reynolds_number(1.225,15.0,0.5,0.0000181)); return 0; }

name: mach_number
cpp_unit: double mach_number(double v,double t){ double a=sqrt(1.4*287.05*t); return v/a; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", mach_number(340.0,288.0)); printf("%.10g\n", mach_number(680.0,250.0)); return 0; }

name: doppler_shift
cpp_unit: double doppler_shift(double f,double vs,double vr){ double c=343.0; return f*(c+vr)/(c-vs); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", doppler_shift(440.0,30.0,0.0)); printf("%.10g
", doppler_shift(1000.0,0.0,20.0)); printf("%.10g
", doppler_shift(500.0,10.0,-5.0)); return 0; }

name: cbrt_pow
cpp_unit: double cbrt_pow(double x){ return pow(x, 1.0/3.0); }
mojo_unit:
def cbrt_pow(x: Float64) -> Float64:
    return x ** (1.0 / 3.0)
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", cbrt_pow(8.0)); printf("%.10g
", cbrt_pow(27.0)); printf("%.10g
", cbrt_pow(2.0)); return 0; }

name: log2_ratio
cpp_unit: double log2_ratio(double a,double b){ return log2(a/b); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", log2_ratio(8.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", log2_ratio(3.0,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", log2_ratio(1.0,4.0)); return 0; }

name: sinh_expand
cpp_unit: double sinh_expand(double x){ return 0.5*(exp(x)-exp(-x)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", sinh_expand(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", sinh_expand(1.0)); printf("%.10g
", sinh_expand(-2.0)); return 0; }

name: cosh_expand
cpp_unit: double cosh_expand(double x){ return 0.5*(exp(x)+exp(-x)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", cosh_expand(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", cosh_expand(1.0)); printf("%.10g
", cosh_expand(-2.0)); return 0; }

name: law_of_cosines_side
cpp_unit: double law_of_cosines_side(double a,double b,double angle){ return sqrt(a*a + b*b - 2.0*a*b*cos(angle)); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", law_of_cosines_side(3.0,4.0,1.5707963267948966)); printf("%.10g\n", law_of_cosines_side(5.0,7.0,1.0471975511965976)); return 0; }

name: softmax2_first
cpp_unit: double softmax2_first(double a,double b){ double m=a>b?a:b; double ea=exp(a-m),eb=exp(b-m); return ea/(ea+eb); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", softmax2_first(1.0,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", softmax2_first(0.0,0.0)); printf("%.10g
", softmax2_first(5.0,1.0)); return 0; }
